items.title: Strategiya va Audit
items.summary: Bozor tahlili, raqobatchilar, individual marketing strategiyasi va sotuv voronkasi auditi.
deliverables: Bozor va raqobatchilar tahlili hujjati (40+ sahifa)
Sotuv voronkasi auditi va samarali kanallarni aniqlash
items.outcome: Aniq yo'l xaritasi va prognozlanadigan natijalar.

items.title: Kontent & SMM
items.summary: Sotuvga yo'naltirilgan kontent-plan, ijtimoiy tarmoqlarni professional yuritish, brending va upakovka.
items.outcome: Brand awareness va organik lid oqimi.

items.title: Production
items.summary: Videolar, Reels, motion va grafik kontent ishlab chiqarish.
items.outcome: Premium vizual kontent — maxsus kreativ jamoa bilan.

items.title: Tizimlashtirish
items.summary: Xodimlarni o'qitish, CRM sozlash va shaffof hisobotlar.

items.title: Target
items.summary: Facebook & Instagram targetli reklama, lidogeneratsiya va optimizatsiya.
items.outcome: CPL va ROMI bo'yicha shaffof natijalar.
